All Classes and Interfaces

类
类
说明
AdminController
Admin dashboard controller that displays real-time statistics: application status counts, job application counts, TA workload, and accepted job lists.
AdminController.StatRow
 
AdminController.WorkloadRow
 
AdminManagementController
Admin management controller for managing user accounts and job postings.
AdminService
Admin dashboard service providing aggregate statistics: application status counts, per-job application counts, TA workload, and applicant accepted jobs.
AIService
AI screening service that calls the Volcengine Ark API (Doubao model) to score candidate applications 0-100 with analysis text.
App
JavaFX application entry point.
ApplicantController
Applicant-facing controller for browsing open jobs, applying with resume upload, and managing favorite job postings.
Application
Represents a candidate's application for a specific job, including AI match score and analysis results from the Volcengine Ark service.
ApplicationService
Application management service handling job applications: submission with resume upload, withdrawal, resume updates, status changes with workload tracking, and async AI analysis triggers.
Favorite
Tracks a user's favorite job postings for quick access.
FavoriteService
Service for managing user favorite job postings: toggle favorite status and retrieve favorite jobs.
InputValidator
Utility for input validation and normalization.
Job
Represents a job posting with title, category, requirements, and application limits.
JobController
Controller for the job posting form.
JobService
Job management service handling CRUD operations, job search with keyword relevance scoring, skill-based recommendation for applicants, capacity checks, and auto-incrementing job ID generation.
JsonFileDAO
Monolithic data access object that reads and writes all entity types from flat JSON files.
Launcher
Thin wrapper entry point for the fat JAR.
LoginController
Login and registration screen controller.
MainController
Main application shell controller that builds the role-based sidebar navigation and manages the central content area by dynamically loading FXML views.
MyApplicationsController
Controller displaying the current user's submitted applications.
MyFavoritesController
Controller displaying the current user's favorite job postings in a read-only table.
MyJobsController
Teacher-facing controller for managing their own posted jobs.
ProfileController
Controller for the applicant profile editing screen.
ProfileService
Service for retrieving and updating applicant profiles, including major, student ID, skills, bio, and max workload configuration with input validation.
ScreeningController
Screening controller for teachers and admins to review applications.
SessionManager
Singleton that manages the current login session.
TeacherAccountController
Teacher account screen for editing the teacher's display name.
User
Represents a system user with authentication credentials and role-based access.
UserProfile
Stores an applicant's profile information including skills, bio, and workload tracking.
UserService
User authentication and account management service.
